zh.Roye, Haute-Saône, Bourgogne-Franche-Com: 法國布格-福朗-可特艾豪-薩o洛也
zh.lifeSummary: 當Mathieu I de Roye, de Guerbigny於1248年出生在法國布格-福朗-可特艾豪-薩o洛也時，他的父親Jean I de Roye, de Guerbigny, Becquigny, Monchy I51歲，母親Jeanne Adele de Hangest-en-Santerre28歲。他於1261年與Alix de Boubers在法國布格-福朗-可特艾豪-薩o洛也結婚。他們至少是6個兒子的父母。他去世於1301年享年53歲。

zh-hans.Roye, Haute-Saône, Bourgogne-Franche-Com: 法国布格-福朗-可特艾豪-薩o洛也
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mathieu I de Roye, de Guerbigny于1248年出生在法国布格-福朗-可特艾豪-薩o洛也时，他的父亲Jean I de Roye, de Guerbigny, Becquigny, Monchy I51岁，母亲Jeanne Adele de Hangest-en-Santerre28岁。他于1261年与Alix de Boubers在法国布格-福朗-可特艾豪-薩o洛也结婚。他们至少是6个儿子的父母。他去世于1301年享年53岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Roye,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of Croatian Roje: from a pet form of Slavic compound personal names based on the element rod ‘generation, family, relatives’, e.g. Rodimir.
Germanized or Americanized form of Sorbian Roj, Rój or Roja (see Roy 4).

variants.name: Roy
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Lucien, Normand, Andre, Jacques, Marcel, Emile, Laurent, Pierre, Cecile, Donat, Gilles.  Indian Dipak, Sumit, Amit, Ajit, Dipankar, Partha, Ranjan, Shyamal, Aloke, Amitava, Chitra, Gautam.
Scottish: nickname for a person with red hair or a ruddy complexion, from Gaelic ruadh ‘red’. Compare Reed .
English (of Norman origin): from Old French roi ‘king’, used as a nickname (see 3 below) and also as a personal name. Compare Ray 2.

variants.name: Matthew
meanings: form of the name of the Christian evangelist, author of the first gospel in the New Testament. His name is a form of the Hebrew name Mattathia, meaning ‘gift of God’, which is fairly common in the Old Testament, being rendered in the Authorized Version in a number of different forms: Mattan(i)ah, Mattatha(h), Mattithiah, Mattathias, and so on. In the Authorized Version, the evangelist is regularly referred to as Matthew, while the apostle chosen to replace Judas Iscariot is distinguished as Matthias . A related name from the same Hebrew roots, but reversed, is Jonathan . Throughout the English-speaking world Matthew has been particularly popular since the 1970s.

en.lifeSummary: When Mathieu I de Roye, de Guerbigny was born in 1248, in Roye, Haute-Saône, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France, his father, Jean I de Roye, de Guerbigny, Becquigny, Monchy I, was 51 and his mother, Jeanne Adele de Hangest-en-Santerre, was 28. He married Alix de Boubers in 1261, in Roye, Haute-Saône, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France. They were the parents of at least 6 sons. He died in 1301, at the age of 53.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mathieu I de Roye, de Guerbigny est né en 1248, à Roye, Haute-Saône, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France, son père, Jean I de Roye, de Guerbigny, Becquigny, Monchy I, avait 51 ans et sa mère, Jeanne Adele de Hangest-en-Santerre, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Alix de Boubers en 1261, à Roye, Haute-Saône, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils. Il est décédé en 1301, à l’âge de 53 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mathieu I de Roye, de Guerbigny 1248 in Roye, Haute-Saône, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Jean I de Roye, de Guerbigny, Becquigny, Monchy I 51 und seine Mutter Jeanne Adele de Hangest-en-Santerre 28. Er hat 1261 in Roye, Haute-Saône, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Frankreich Alix de Boubers geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne. Er starb 1301 im Alter von 53 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mathieu I de Roye, de Guerbigny è nato il nel 1248 nel Roye, Haute-Saône, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia, il suo padre, Jean I de Roye, de Guerbigny, Becquigny, Monchy I, aveva 51 anni e il suo madre, Jeanne Adele de Hangest-en-Santerre, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Alix de Boubers nel 1261, nel Roye, Haute-Saône, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli. Morì nel 1301, all'età di 53 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Mathieu I de Roye, de Guerbignyが1248年にフランスボウルゴグネ-フランチェ-コムトeハウテ-サoンロイで生まれた時，父Jean I de Roye, de Guerbigny, Becquigny, Monchy Iは51歳，母Jeanne Adele de Hangest-en-Santerreは28歳であった。1261年にフランスボウルゴグネ-フランチェ-コムトeハウテ-サoンロイでAlix de Boubersと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子の親であった。彼は1301年に53歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Mathieu I de Roye, de Guerbigny(이)가 1248년 프랑스 부르고그니-프랭체-코트e 하테-사o니 로예에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Jean I de Roye, de Guerbigny, Becquigny, Monchy I(은)는 51세였고, 그의 어머니 Jeanne Adele de Hangest-en-Santerre(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1261년 프랑스 부르고그니-프랭체-코트e 하테-사o니 로예에서 Alix de Boubers(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1301년 53세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mathieu I de Roye, de Guerbigny nasceu em 1248, em Roye, Haute-Saône, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, França, seu pai, Jean I de Roye, de Guerbigny, Becquigny, Monchy I, tinha 51 anos e sua mãe, Jeanne Adele de Hangest-en-Santerre, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Alix de Boubers em 1261, em Roye, Haute-Saône, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1301, com 53 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mathieu I de Roye, de Guerbigny родился в 1248 г. в местности рои, хауте-саoн, бургогне-фрэнче-комтe, Франция, его отцу по имени Jean I de Roye, de Guerbigny, Becquigny, Monchy I было 51 год, а матери, которую звали Jeanne Adele de Hangest-en-Santerre, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Alix de Boubers в 1261 г. в местности рои, хауте-саoн, бургогне-фрэнче-комтe, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей. Он умер в 1301 г. в возрасте 53 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mathieu I de Roye, de Guerbigny nació en 1248, en Roye, Haute-Saône, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia, su papá, Jean I de Roye, de Guerbigny, Becquigny, Monchy I, tenía 51 años y su mamá, Jeanne Adele de Hangest-en-Santerre, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Alix de Boubers en 1261, en Roye, Haute-Saône, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos. Murió en 1301, a la edad de 53 años.
